headline: BofA Notes Strong Profitability and Sales Performance at The TJX Companies (TJX)
summary: We recently compiled a list of the 11 Best Economic Recovery Stocks to Buy Now. The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TJX) is one of the best recovery stocks on this list. TheFly reported on February 26 that BofA increased its price target for The TJX to $175 from $168 and retained a Buy rating on the shares. […]

headline: 3 Market-Beating Stocks on Our Watchlist
summary: The best-performing stocks typically have robust sales growth, increasing margins, and rising returns on capital, and those that can maintain this trifecta year in and year out often become the legends of the investing world.

headline: Trump tariffs: Martin Heinrich bill would give families tax rebate for higher import costs
summary: The Supreme Court in a 6-3 ruling Feb. 20 ruled that President Donald Trumps IEEPA tariffs were illegal.
